perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) POV shot showing a hand holding the hand of a woman with long reddish-brown hair wearing a blue and white floral off-the-shoulder top; she looks concerned and points at the camera. (2) Scene cuts to a different woman with black hair and bangs, wearing a white crochet top, who smiles brightly and leans toward the camera while holding the hand. (3) Scene cuts back to the first woman, who appears skeptical and gestures with her free hand while maintaining the hand-hold. (4) Scene cuts back to the second woman, who smiles and nods enthusiastically. The background is a sunny outdoor public square with trees and parked cars.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat pop music begins with high-pitched female vocals singing "My name is Pink and I'm really glad to meet you". (2) The music continues with a steady, dance-pop drum beat and synthetic instrumental layer; no live speech or ambient noise is audible over the music track. (3) The music maintains its tempo and vocal style until the video ends abruptly with the song's beat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "POV 颱風天來找我的韓國朋友 🇰🇷" (POV: My Korean friend came to see me on a typhoon day) in a black banner. (2) Functional text: "你現在想去台南?" (You want to go to Tainan now?) in white with a black shadow. (3) Functional text: "嘿呀 🙂 (🇰🇷 護理師朋友)" (Yeah - Korean nurse friend) appearing with a smiley emoji. (4) Functional text: "颱風要來欸?..." (Typhoon is coming though?...) indicating concern. (5) Functional text: "沒關係呀 🙂 我愛台南 ❤️" (It's okay, I love Tainan) indicating excitement and affection.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a conversational exchange through a series of reactive cuts between two characters in a POV hand-holding format.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female subjects, 1 child running in background, 2 blurred passers-by in the far distance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Girl 1 has long reddish-brown hair and wears a blue floral top; Girl 2 has black hair with bangs and wears a white crochet top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A public outdoor plaza or park area with green trees, stone pavement, and some parked vehicles in the distance.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight, bright and slightly overcast.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Dialogue Interaction -> Emotional Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously illustrate the enthusiasm of a foreign friend wanting to visit a specific city (Tainan) despite the inconvenient timing of a typhoon, using a popular hand-holding POV trend.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Hand-holding POV perspective with text-based dialogue overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a popular 'leading by the hand' visual meme format common on TikTok/Reels to frame a relatable social situation between friends.
